32202: In ZIP Code 32202, approximately 6,023 residents have a life expectancy of 73.1 years, 3.3 years below the county average. Our Resource Desert Composite Score of 1.00 confirms this neighborhood as one of Jacksonville's most critical resource deserts, with significant gaps across healthcare, food access, and green space.
